sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n69279" key="murio/moxqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μῡρῐό-μοχθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n69279.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of countless labours</tr_>, of Heracles, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">APl.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4.91</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
